<|im_system|>system<|im_middle|>You are Kimi, an AI assistant created by Moonshot AI.<|im_end|><|im_user|>user<|im_middle|>user message<|im_end|><|im_assistant|>assistant<|im_middle|><think></think>assistant message<|im_end|><|im_user|>user<|im_middle|><|im_end|><|im_assistant|>assistant<|im_middle|><think>reasoning message 2</think>assistant message 2<|tool_calls_section_begin|><|tool_call_begin|>functions.function_name:0<|tool_call_argument_begin|>{"argument": "value"}<|tool_call_end|><|tool_calls_section_end|><|im_end|><|im_system|>tool<|im_middle|>## Return of functions.function_name:0
tool call result<|im_end|><|im_assistant|>assistant<|im_middle|>
